backend.choice_reason: A model-local Python 3.10 venv was the lowest-risk executable backend on this host and matched the upstream pip workflow.

history.mitigation: Installed s3prl after import failed on an eager optional frontend dependency.
Pinned torch==2.1.2 and torchaudio==2.1.2 after s3prl hit a removed torchaudio API under torchaudio 2.11.0.
Stopped and escalated when import exposed another undeclared optional frontend dependency (`whisper`).

failure.message: wespeaker import still requires undeclared optional frontend dependency `whisper` before the minimal speaker verification path can even import. Further dependency expansion would exceed the bounded retry policy.

notes: Phase-1 stopped at VALIDATE_IMPORT. No wrapper was generated because VALIDATE_CONTRACT did not pass. Human escalation was triggered after repeated unresolved import-stage failures.
